reason: NULL/empty candidate name (brief generator bug — only "2" in candidate_name field). Could not resolve a person to research.
recommendation: Fix brief generator in main.py to (1) check candidate name against data/candidate_series.json registry before queuing a dossier brief, (2) drop any name from known_events that doesn't resolve to a registered ballot candidate. Better yet — only queue dossier briefs for names that appear in the upcoming-7-days slice of the registry schedule. This run produced 11 wasted dossier briefs on out-of-jurisdiction names harvested from news events.
